Tokenomic

Institutional DeFi education and intelligence platform. Structured courses, on-chain analytics, and verifiable credentials for teams entering decentralized finance.

Training

Training

  • Home
  • Training
Courses
Enhance your career with our comprehensive DeFi courses, covering everything from blockchain basics to advanced governance, equipping you with in-demand skills for the tech and finance industries.
01

Introduction to Decentralized Finance (DeFi)

Introduction to DeFi basics, history, and differences from traditional finance.
02

Technical Foundations of Blockchain & DeFi

Provide a deeper technical understanding of the technologies that underpin DeFi.
03

DeFi Tokenomics & Valuation

Understand the economic models and valuation techniques for DeFi tokens.
04

DeFi Products & Services

Explore the range of products and services available in the DeFi ecosystem.
05

Risk Management in DeFi

Equip participants with the knowledge to identify and manage risks in DeFi.
06

Regulatory Environment & Compliance

Provide an understanding of the regulatory landscape affecting DeFi globally.
07

Implementation Strategies for Institutions

Guide institutions on how to integrate and leverage DeFi technologies.
08

Advanced DeFi Strategies

Dive into advanced strategies utilized within DeFi markets.
Workshops
Gain hands-on experience and valuable insights through our live DeFi workshops, where you can apply knowledge in real-world scenarios and network with industry experts and peers.
01

Creating Your First Crypto Wallet

Set up a crypto wallet, buy and sell cryptocurrencies, navigate both decentralized (DEX) and centralized exchanges (CEX).
02

Create Your First NFT Wallet and Mint NFTs

Set up an NFT wallet, mint your first NFT, buy and trade NFTs on various platforms, and understand NFT copyrights and licensing.
03

Yield Farming and Staking

Learn the basics of yield farming and staking, join yield farming pools, stake crypto for rewards, and understand the risks and benefits.
04

Lending and Borrowing

Explore a variety of products and services within the DeFi ecosystem, including lending and borrowing platforms.
Tokenomic provides concise, tailored courses, consultations, and market analysis for DeFi integration. Our experts span technical, legal, financial, and artistic fields, delivering comprehensive support. Through workshops and insights, we enable institutions to succeed in digital finance.
